channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bato dela Rosa Evades ICC Arrest During Senate Chaos
item.description: On May 11, 2026, Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa, former police chief under Rodrigo Duterte, made a dramatic appearance in the Senate amid a political upheaval. After months of staying out of the publ...

item.title: APC Reps Primaries in Ondo See Smooth Polls in Some Areas, But Controversy Hits Okitipupa/Irele
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) held rescheduled primaries for the House of Representatives seats in Ondo State on Saturday, May 17, 2026. Reactions from party aspirants dey mixed. For Akure South...

item.title: Ramaphosa Fires Tolashe Amid Ongoing Political Challenges
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has finally taken decisive action by dismissing Social Development Minister Sisisi Tolashe following multiple allegations of misconduct. Reports revealed that Tolashe misused...

item.title: RAF to deploy cost-effective precision missiles to counter Iranian drones
item.description: The Royal Air Force (RAF) will soon equip its Typhoon jets in the Middle East with the Advanced Precision Kill Weapon System (APKWS), a move aimed at intercepting Iranian drones more efficiently and e...

item.title: Sally Motlana: Detention, Defiance, and the Fight Against Apartheid
item.description: This extract from 'Faith & Defiance: The Life of Sally Motlana' by Mukoni Ratshitanga chronicles the life and struggles of veteran South African activist Sally Motlana, who passed away in 2023 at age ...

item.title: Treasurer says budget unlikely to generate immediate voter support amid tax debates
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has indicated that the government's latest budget reforms are unlikely to deliver an immediate boost in public support. The budget, which includes controversial changes to negat...

item.title: ISPR Responds to Indian Army Chief’s Remarks on Pakistan’s Role in the Region
item.description: The Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR) of Pakistan strongly reacted to comments made by Indian Army Chief Gen Upendra Dwivedi, in which he reportedly said Pakistan should decide whether it wants t...

item.title: Pakistan Achieves $500 Million in Seafood Exports with Russia Market Boost
item.description: Pakistan's seafood sector has reached a significant milestone, with exports crossing the $500 million mark in the first eleven months of the current fiscal year, according to Maritime Affairs Minister...

item.title: Reflections on Public Perception and Caution in Times of Uncertainty
item.description: The article 'News To Me – A dose of caution' by Gabrielle Drolet presents a lighthearted, cartoon-style commentary on how people respond to potential crises. Through simple dialogue, it highlights a c...

item.title: The Oases of Ubari: Lakes Hidden in the Libyan Desert
item.description: Ubari, located in southern Libya, is home to a remarkable set of lakes known as the Ubari Lakes, situated within the vast expanse of the Sahara Desert. This desert region, sometimes called the Sand Se...

item.title: Roselyn Akombe Returns to Kenya to Attend Senator Onyonka’s Mother’s Funeral and Proposes Scholarship
item.description: Former IEBC Commissioner Roselyn Akombe has returned to Kenya to attend the funeral of Mama Teresiah, mother of Kisii Senator Richard Onyonka. Speaking at the ceremony, Akombe eulogised Mama Teresiah ...

item.title: Violence in Jacobabad Leaves Over 100 Homes Destroyed After Inter-Community Marriage Dispute
item.description: In Jacobabad district of Sindh, over 100 homes were set on fire following a violent dispute over a free-will marriage between a 14-year-old girl from the Channa community and Muhammad Hassan Buriro fr...

item.title: Greg Brockman Assumes Leadership of OpenAI's Product Strategy Amid CEO Medical Leave
item.description: OpenAI co-founder and president Greg Brockman has officially taken over the company’s product strategy, stepping in while CEO of AGI deployment, Fidji Simo, is on medical leave. This move formalizes B...

item.title: Researchers develop diabetes treatment from Warburgia salutaris while promoting conservation
item.description: Researchers at the University of Johannesburg (UJ) are investigating a compound derived from Warburgia salutaris, a tree traditionally used across Southern Africa for medicinal purposes, as a compleme...

item.title: New Brunswick expands healthcare options for residents without family doctors
item.description: New Brunswick has announced a significant initiative aimed at providing healthcare access to residents who do not currently have family doctors. The provincial government is implementing a comprehensi...

item.title: Durban Woman Linked to Standerton Drug Lab Hands Herself Over to Hawks
item.description: Over a year after authorities uncovered over R3,6 million hidden in the boot of a car during a raid on a clandestine drug laboratory in Standerton, a Durban woman, Sandra Pillay, 53, has surrendered t...

item.title: Tensions between Meghan Markle and Kate Middleton over royal protocol and bridesmaid's dress highlighted during wedding preparations
item.description: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry's wedding in May 2018 was widely described as a 'fairytale', yet behind the scenes tensions simmered, particularly between Meghan and the Princess of Wales, Catherine. A...

item.title: PM Modi Warns Global Crises Could Undermine Decades of Progress, Highlights India’s Growth
item.description: During his visit to The Hague in the Netherlands, Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed the Indian diaspora, emphasising the serious challenges facing the world today. He highlighted how the aftermat...

item.title: Brooklyn Beckham's Confidence and Passion Make Him an Unconventional Role Model
item.description: Brooklyn Beckham has frequently been criticised as a 'nepo baby', yet he continues to pursue activities that bring him joy without concern for public opinion. Unlike other privileged individuals who m...

item.title: Sydney’s auction clearance rate falls as federal tax changes hit housing market
item.description: The Sydney property auction market experienced a notable slowdown over the past weekend, with fewer than half of listed homes successfully selling. Preliminary data from Cotality shows the city’s clea...
